hero_match.title: New Zealand vs South Africa - 4th T20 (Result Reported)
hero_match.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

ranked_matches.title: Sheffield Shield Final: Victoria vs. South Australia (Starts March 26)

summary: The 4th T20 between New Zealand and South Africa concluded today, with South Africa winning by 19 runs to level the series 2-2. There are no scheduled matches for Chandigarh T20 or AFC U20 Asian Cup today. The Sheffield Shield Final is scheduled to begin on March 26.
